final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing employee ID card for a company called 字节期动, showing both front and back sides.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography of a corporate ID badge, clean institutional design
Subject: employee ID card for "字节期动", professional portrait placeholder area, company name, employee name field, ID number field, department field, issue date, barcode or QR code
Scene/backdrop: neutral gray studio background, card shown at slight angle to display both front and back faces simultaneously
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from upper left, subtle shadow for depth, professional and trustworthy mood
Color palette: corporate blue or teal as primary accent, white background, subtle gray text hierarchy
Materials/textures: matte laminated plastic card surface, slight edge thickness visible, subtle gloss reflection on lamination
Text (verbatim): "字节期动"
Constraints: must show both front and back of the card in one frame; text must be legible; realistic card proportions (85.6mm × 54mm)
Avoid: fantasy elements, cartoon style, overly glossy plastic look, cluttered layout, watermark, generic stock photo aesthetic
